safety_notes: Use the user's configured constraints and stop conditions.

workouts.name: Beginner strength circuit
workouts.intent: Practice consistency and basic movement patterns.
steps: 2 rounds of sit-to-stand, wall push-up, band row, and easy carry
modifications: Reduce to one round if recovery is low
Skip or replace any movement that conflicts with professional guidance

habits.name: Recovery note
habits.target: Write one sentence about energy or soreness

checkins.prompt: Did the strength circuit happen as planned, as a smaller version, or should I log the blocker?
